creator: ykirill@yahoo.com
text:
I managed to build vtk9. I removed mpich package and tried to continue vtk9 build but it ends with error:
===>  Building for vtk9-9.2.2_1
ninja: error: '/usr/local/lib/libmpi.so', needed by 'lib/libvtkParallelMPI-9.2.so.9.2.2', missing and no known rule to make it
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/math/vtk9
*** Error code 1

Next I do a clean vtk9 build while mpich was uninstalled and this time with success. Then installed mpich and upgraded opencascade and kicad.
